articles.title: INTRODUCING WEB-WORLD MODELS
articles.summary: Convergence's AI Agent, Proxy [4] just achieved state of the art results on the WebVoyager benchmark, topping Claude Computer Use (Anthropic), Agent E (Emergence), and Runner H (H Company).

articles.title: XAI'S IMAGE GENERATOR
articles.summary: xAI's Aurora is an advanced image generation model integrated into Grok 2.

articles.title: OPENAI'S REINFORCEMENT FINE-TUNING RESEARCH PROGRAM
articles.summary: Reinforcement Fine-Tuning allows developers to train AI models to excel at specific, expert-level tasks by grading their responses against reference answers.

articles.title: OPENAI 12 DAYS OF “SHIP-MAS”
articles.summary: OpenAI's 12 days of “ship-mas” has officially begun, with the company set to reveal some new features, products, and demos during all 12 days starting December 5, just a few days shy of the second anniversary of ChatGPT's explosive launch in 2022.

articles.title: ALIGN3R
articles.summary: An improved alignment method that has consistent depth estimation for videos. It is built on Dust3r and shows strong performance in 3D estimation.

articles.title: IS IMAGENET WORTH ONE LONG VIDEO?
articles.summary: By training an image encoded, unsupervised, on a single long walking video, this work shows how clever model changes can result in extremely powerful representations.

articles.title: FLASHATTENTION ON A NAPKIN
articles.summary: FlashAttention is an extremely performant software implementation of attention. It is hardware aware and prevents unnecessary I/O. However, it can be challenging to understand. This paper aims to clarify and simplify the algorithm with diagrams and explanations.

articles.title: ACHIEVING 8X BETTER COST PER TOKEN WITH THE NVIDIA GH200 ON LAMBDA CLOUD
Looking for the most efficient ways to run LLM inference? Lambda
articles.summary: compared the performance of a single instance NVIDIA GH200 Grace Hopper Superchip to a single instance NVIDIA H100 SXM GPU, running Llama 3.1 70B inference with CPU Offloading. See the full benchmark

articles.title: results here
CLEARVOICE-STUDIO
articles.summary: Unified platform for audio separation, speech understanding, and speech enhancement.

articles.title: DOCOWL
articles.summary: OCR-free document understanding with multimodal LLMs. It has strong chart understanding, table extraction, and more.

articles.title: TRELLIS: STRUCTURED 3D LATENTS FOR SCALABLE AND VERSATILE 3D GENERATION
articles.summary: 3D image and text generation models from Microsoft. These are the strongest models in the space today as they excel at 3D occlusions.

articles.title: OPENAI MAY LAUNCH SORA, ITS TEXT-TO-VIDEO MODEL, VERY SOON
articles.summary: OpenAI plans to introduce new AI features, including a text-to-video tool called Sora and a reasoning model, over a 12-day livestream event. Sora has faced criticism regarding data provenance, with concerns over the potential use of YouTube content without permission. Google is also developing a text-to-video tool, Veo, currently available for private review.

articles.title: GOOGLE'S NEW GENERATIVE AI VIDEO MODEL IS NOW AVAILABLE
articles.summary: Google's Veo, a generative AI video model, is now available via Vertex AI for businesses. It creates high-quality 1080p videos from text or images. Veo includes safeguards and DeepMind's SynthID digital watermark to address copyright and misinformation concerns. Google has expanded access to Imagen 3 for text-to-image generation on Google Cloud, with new features for brand customization.

articles.title: ELON MUSK'S XAI TO EXPAND COLOSSUS SUPERCOMPUTER, BOOSTING MEMPHIS AS EMERGING AI HUB
articles.summary: xAI is expanding its Colossus supercomputer facility in Memphis, adding one million GPUs to strengthen its AI capabilities. This move positions Memphis as a potential global hub for AI innovation, attracting major companies like Nvidia and Dell. The Greater Memphis Chamber supports this growth and has established a special team to expedite xAI's expansion.

articles.title: A CONVERSATION WITH SAM ALTMAN ON OPENAI'S VISION AND OPERATIONS
articles.summary: In this recorded conversation, Turing CEO and Co-Founder Jonathan Siddharth chats with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman about the company's vision for beneficial, accessible, and safe AGI. Watch episode 1 of AGI Icons

articles.title: here
OPENAI AND ANDURIL PARTNER ON DEFENSE AI APPLICATIONS
articles.summary: OpenAI has partnered with Anduril Industries to develop AI solutions for military applications, focusing on counter-drone defense systems.

articles.title: META QUIETLY LEANS ON RIVAL GPT-4 DESPITE ZUCKERBERG'S BOLD LLAMA CLAIMS
articles.summary: Meta's hybrid approach combines Llama and GPT-4 to optimize generative AI capabilities.

articles.title: AWS BRINGS PROMPT ROUTING AND CACHING TO ITS BEDROCK LLM SERVICE
articles.summary: AWS announced caching and intelligent prompt routing for its Bedrock LLM hosting service to optimize cost and performance.
